name: character-asset-prompt-skill
title: Character asset prompt skill
description: Capture reusable character material prompt-generation patterns from visual style examples into a project Trellis skill/spec for FableMap NPC creation.
creator: lijin
notes: Captured user-provided prompt/style workflow as project Trellis skills/spec. Default material generation now uses image-style-prompt-extractor first; missing project styles should be added as full style recipes. No runtime code or image assets changed.

meta.pending_review_note: Skill/spec work is validated but still in review until human acceptance, commit, and record-session.
meta.species_diversity_rule: Character prompt templates now include species/body-plan; no new schema fields.

species_diversity_verification.runtime_tests: not run; docs/skill/task rule update only
